name: Cortera Business Credit API
what_it_does: Cortera business credit and risk data REST API for B2B trade credit intelligence, payment behavior data, and supplier risk assessment. Enables AI agents to retrieve business payment behavior scores and trade credit risk indicators for B2B credit decisioning, access industry-specific payment behavior benchmarks for sector risk comparison, retrieve company firmographic data for account enrichment and segmentation, manage business credit monitoring and change alert subscriptions for ongoing risk management, access small business credit data with alternative data sources for thin-file companies, retrieve industry payment trend data for portfolio risk analysis, manage credit limit recommendation data for automated credit policy enforcement, access business identity verification for onboarding KYB workflows, retrieve accounts receivable risk scores for invoice factoring and collections automation, and integrate Cortera with CRM, ERP, and credit management platforms.
use_cases: Setting credit limits from B2B credit policy agents
Monitoring customer payment risk from AR management agents
Assessing supplier risk from procurement agents
Enriching account profiles from CRM data agents
not_for: International business intelligence beyond North America
Real-time fraud detection requiring sub-100ms latency
best_when: A B2B lender, trade credit manager, accounts receivable team, or procurement organization wanting AI agents to automate business credit decisions, payment risk monitoring, and supplier risk assessment with alternative trade credit data.
avoid_when: FCRA APPLICABILITY FOR SMALL BUSINESS: Cortera data used in credit decisions for sole proprietors or very small businesses may trigger FCRA obligations for adverse action notice and data source disclosure; consult legal counsel before automating denial workflows. Data freshness for thin-file companies — Cortera payment data for small and micro businesses with limited trade lines may be months stale; automated credit decisions for thin-file businesses require freshness validation before reliance. ECOA disparate impact — automated credit decisions using Cortera industry classification or geographic data proxies must be tested for disparate impact on protected-class business owners; automated models without disparate impact testing create fair lending exposure.

auth.notes: Cortera uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Boca Raton, Florida HQ. Founded 2009. Private. Focuses on alternative trade credit data and payment behavior. Targets mid-market B2B credit teams. Competes with Dun & Bradstreet, Experian Business, and Creditsafe for B2B credit intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-report or subscription pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-report and annual subscription; monitoring and portfolio pricing available
pricing.notes: Boca Raton FL. Founded 2009. Private. Alternative trade credit data. Mid-market B2B credit focus. Per-report and subscription pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: THIN-FILE DATA STALENESS: Cortera payment data for small businesses with few trade lines may be 3-12 months stale; automated credit decisions must validate data freshness date before reliance; reject decisions on data older than 90 days for time-sensitive credit policy
No webhooks — credit score change and payment behavior update events require polling; no push notification for business risk change alerts; implement scheduled monitoring refresh

FCRA uncertainty for micro-business credit decisions — sole proprietors and very small single-member LLCs may be treated as consumers under FCRA interpretation; consult legal counsel before automated denial workflows using Cortera data

Entity matching for DBA names — automated business lookup for companies operating under DBA (doing business as) names may fail to match against legal entity records; implement fuzzy match and manual fallback for DBA-only identifiers

Geographic coverage gaps — Cortera trade credit data is US-focused with thinner coverage for businesses in rural markets; automated credit decisions for rural small businesses may rely on fewer trade lines than urban counterparts

Score model versioning — Cortera credit score models may update without advance notice; automated credit policy thresholds calibrated against prior model versions may miscategorize risk after model refresh
agent_readiness.security_notes: Business credit data. SOC2. API key. US. B2B payment behavior and trade credit data.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B credit data. SOC2. API key. US. Trade credit and payment behavior.
